recommended_mitigations.title: Enforce signed firmware with verified public keys
recommended_mitigations.description: Ensure each device verifies firmware signatures with a vetted public key and rejects unsigned or invalid updates.

recommended_mitigations.title: Disable telnet and cleartext services
recommended_mitigations.description: Remove telnet daemon and other cleartext network services from production firmware.

recommended_mitigations.title: Secure debug interfaces
recommended_mitigations.description: Disable JTAG and debug interfaces in production builds, or protect them with cryptographic authentication.

recommended_mitigations.title: Remove hardcoded credentials
recommended_mitigations.description: Replace hardcoded passwords and factory keys with secure key derivation or provisioning mechanisms.

recommended_mitigations.title: Enforce signed firmware with verified public keys
recommended_mitigations.description: Ensure each device verifies firmware signatures with a vetted public key and rejects unsigned or invalid updates.

recommended_mitigations.title: Implement secure provisioning
recommended_mitigations.description: Replace demo tokens with cryptographically secure, unique per-device provisioning credentials.

recommended_mitigations.title: Validate all firmware signatures
recommended_mitigations.description: Ensure bootloader validates the signature of subsequent firmware images before loading.

recommended_mitigations.title: Enforce signed firmware with verified public keys
recommended_mitigations.description: Ensure each device verifies firmware signatures with a vetted public key and rejects unsigned or invalid updates.
